subcodes.first_line: O Lord! These servants are Thy companions and these handmaidens are the cherished ones of Thy threshold. Each one is bewildered in Thy path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار این بندگان یاران تو و این کنیزان عزیزان درگاه تو هر یک سرگشته کوی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @love of God, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
